zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Thomas Axtell於1415年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾波文格頓時，他的父親Mr. Henry Axtell34歲，母親Mrs. Henry Axtell29歲。他於1434年與Joan Gould在英國英格蘭賀特福爾波文格頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1501年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾達可盧姆享年86歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾達可盧姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Thomas Axtell于1415年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾波文格頓时，他的父亲Mr. Henry Axtell34岁，母亲Mrs. Henry Axtell29岁。他于1434年与Joan Gould在英国英格兰賀特福爾波文格頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1501年在英国英格兰賀特福爾達可盧姆享年86岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾達可盧姆。

nameMeanings.name: Axtell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Asketill, from Old Norse Ásketill, composed of the elements áss ‘god’ + ketill ‘sacrificial cauldron, helmet’ (see also Haskell ). This name was in use both among Scandinavian settlers in eastern England (esp. Norfolk) and among the Normans.

nickname for a salt merchant or seller of salt, from Middle English hakke-salt ‘chop salt (into pieces)’. The development of the surname to Axtel is evidenced in 16th-century Hertfordshire and Buckinghamshire.

variants.name: Axton
meanings: habitational name from Axton in Kent, named from the Old English personal name Acca + Old English stān ‘stone’.

(Buckinghamshire): possibly a variant of Axtell , or alternatively a habitational name from a metathesized form of a placename such as Ashton in Bainton, Northamptonshire, which is recorded as Axton in 1253.

variants.name: Antell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Antil, a shortened form of Anketil, a common Norman variant of Old Norse Ásketill (see Axtell ).
English: variant of   Antill  , a habitational name from Ampthill in Bedfordshire.

Swedish and Finnish (of Swedish origin): ornamental name from placenames in Finland and Sweden such as Ant(t)ila and Antby, or from the Finnish personal name Antti (a vernacular form of Andreas ), + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

variants.name: Estell
meanings: variant of Eskell, from the Middle English personal name Askell, Old Norse Áskell, a shortened form of Ásketill (see Axtell ). The personal name was also popular among the Normans, sometimes in the form Anskell (ancient Germanic Ans- substituted for As-), which largely explains why the name occurs in post-Conquest England in counties not settled by Vikings.

topographic name from Middle English est ‘east’ + hal(le) ‘chief building, hall’ or hale ‘nook, remote place’ (Old English ēast + hall or halh), denoting someone who lived or worked at the ‘east hall’ or who lived at a place known as the ‘east nook’.

variants.name: Haskell
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Askell with prosthetic H-, from Old Norse Áskell, a shortened form of Ásketill (see Axtell ). The personal name was also popular among the Normans, sometimes in the form Anskell (with ancient Germanic Ans- substituted for As-), which explains why the name occurs in post-Conquest England in counties not settled by Vikings. Its appearance as a surname is often disguised by altered pronunciations; metathesis of /sk/ to /ks/, spelled -x-, for example, has given rise to Axtell . The Normans frequently used the name in Frankish forms; see Askin , Haskin , Hasty , and Astin . For the name in the Isle of Man see Castell .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Khaskl, a Yiddish form of the Hebrew name Yeḥezqel (see Ezekiel ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Thomas Axtell was born in 1415, in Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Mr. Henry Axtell, was 34 and his mother, Mrs. Henry Axtell, was 29. He married Joan Gould in 1434, in Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1501, in Dacorum, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86, and was buried in Dacorum, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Thomas Axtell est né en 1415, à Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Mr. Henry Axtell, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Henry Axtell, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joan Gould en 1434, à Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1501, à Dacorum, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Dacorum, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Thomas Axtell 1415 in Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mr. Henry Axtell 34 und seine Mutter Mrs. Henry Axtell 29. Er hat 1434 in Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Gould geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1501 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Dacorum, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dacorum, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Thomas Axtell è nato il nel 1415 nel Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Mr. Henry Axtell, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Henry Axtell, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Joan Gould nel 1434, nel Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1501, nel Dacorum, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Dacorum, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Thomas Axtellが1415年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアボヴィングドンで生まれた時，父Mr. Henry Axtellは34歳，母Mrs. Henry Axtellは29歳であった。1434年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアボヴィングドンでJoan Gouldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1501年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアダコルムで86歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアダコルムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Thomas Axtell(이)가 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 보빙던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mr. Henry Axtell(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Henry Axtell(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 보빙던에서 Joan Gould(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 다코럼에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 다코럼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Thomas Axtell nasceu em 1415, em Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Mr. Henry Axtell, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Henry Axtell, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Gould em 1434, em Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1501, em Dacorum, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Dacorum, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Thomas Axtell родился в 1415 г. в местности бовингдон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Mr. Henry Axtell было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Henry Axtell, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Gould в 1434 г. в местности бовингдон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1501 г. в местности дакорум, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности дакорум, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Thomas Axtell nació en 1415, en Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Mr. Henry Axtell, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mrs. Henry Axtell, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Joan Gould en 1434, en Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1501, en Dacorum, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Dacorum, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
